title: Sazon Broil Crisp Keto
description: A fresh and adventurous German dish featuring sazon for a keto-friendly twist on crispy textures.
instructions: Mix the Sazon seasoning with the Avocado Oil in a small bowl.
Lay out the beef slices on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, drizzling some of the seasoned oil over each slice. Season both sides generously with sea salt.
Arrange kale leaves around the beef slices to keep them moist while broiling.
Broil for 10 minutes on high heat. Reduce heat to medium-high and continue cooking until the beef is lightly charred, about another 5-7 minutes.
Sprinkle fresh basil leaves over the top before serving.
